gateArtifactNote: slop-gate-notes-r2.json contained 62 KILL findings but no suggestedFix or crossChecked fields, so all revision changes in this pass are self-authored.

changes.before: That did it. His eyes changed; the door he had hoped to keep shut had just opened anyway.
changes.after: His eyes changed; the door he had hoped to keep shut had just opened anyway.

changes.before: The mare tossed her head once going under the gate... Workers, busy and fed and moving with the confidence of a place that expected its own order to hold.
changes.after: The mare tossed her head under the gate... They were busy, fed, and sure the estate ran the way it was meant to.

changes.before: The great hall beyond carried the expensive stillness... Imported work, and old money paying for it.
changes.after: The great hall beyond was too still for a room this warm... Imported work. Old money paid for it.

changes.before: His smile stayed in place, though the corners tightened.
changes.after: His smile held, but the corners of his mouth tightened.

changes.before: Hands used to ink, glass, and live reagents. / Jandice almost smiled, then checked herself.
changes.after: Those scars came from ink, glass, and live reagents. / Her mouth twitched, then stilled.

changes.before: Alexei and Jandice had been waiting for scrutiny, then. Perhaps for someone with questions and enough rank to force answers.
changes.after: They had expected scrutiny. They had not expected it from someone with enough rank to force answers.

changes.before: No boatman waited there.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.feedbackRef: gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F4/F7; narrator-seep-guide.md → A4/B2; negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → patterns-1/5
changes.before: A notice, not a wall. / Easy extraction ended there.
changes.after: The outer ward touched the back of Jaina's teeth before the boat reached it, light but deliberate. Enough to mark her. Enough to warn her what the way out would cost.

changes.before: No one needed an ambush. The keep already knew what had entered.
changes.after: The pressure shifted, marked her, and passed the message inward through the lattice.

changes.feedbackRef: gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F1/F6; narrator-seep-guide.md → A2/A1; negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → pattern-2
changes.before: Narrow windows above. Broad doors below. No banners. / Stone floors, scrubbed. Iron brackets polished... No torch smoke.
changes.after: Narrow windows above. Broad doors below. / The stone floors had been scrubbed. Iron brackets caught the light...

changes.before: The labels were neat. The shelves dusted... Whoever had written them had taken Kirin Tor rigor somewhere the Council had nailed shut and gone on building with the stolen tools.
changes.after: Every label was neat. The shelves had been dusted... Whoever had written them had taken Kirin Tor rigor into the place the Council had nailed shut and kept working there with the stolen tools.

changes.before: a path, not a building / They worked in plain sight, which told her more than any hidden room would have.
changes.after: being led one way and not shown the whole of the place / They worked in plain sight. The assistants, ledgers, and open benches told her more than any hidden room could have.

changes.before: The archive occupied a long chamber... / The theorem there pressed straight against the hole... Still incomplete. / Ink and reagent. Dalaran and something fouler laid over it.
changes.after: The archive took up a long chamber... / What sat in the ledger ran straight at the hole... The final waking step was still missing. / The smell nearly did it by itself: old leather... ink and reagent, Dalaran with something fouler laid over it.

changes.before: Real work in those hands... / Order made the room worse.
changes.after: Those hands had done real work, and dangerous work... / The neatness made it worse.

changes.before: the pressure seemed to grow teeth / Strained masonry and thickening wards told her more than Jandice's route did.
changes.after: the pressure grew teeth / Cracks in the masonry and the tightening wards gave her more than Jandice's route did.

changes.before: "Only to you, perhaps." / Irritation crossed Jandice's face, then restraint.
changes.after: "Only to you." / Jandice's jaw tightened, then eased.

changes.before: Jaina almost smiled. / No lock slid.
changes.after: The corner of Jaina's mouth twitched. / [deleted]

changes.before: Page after page pointed to the same answer. The body learned the pattern, held it, repeated it.
changes.after: The same answer kept turning up. Repeated entries showed tissue conditioned until it held the pattern and answered to it again.

changes.before: She looked at the door... and almost left the stone where it was. / The private room is listening, she thought...
changes.after: She looked at the door... and weighed leaving the stone where it was. / The wards in the room were listening, she thought...

changes.before: He cannot move at plague speed, she thought. Neither can the Council.
changes.after: He cannot move at plague speed, she thought. The Council will be worse.

changes.before: "You stayed with the notes," she said, pleased.
changes.after: "You stayed with the notes," she said. Her voice quickened on notes.

changes.before: Conditioned tissue does not merely retain contamination. It learns toward an answer.
changes.after: Conditioned tissue holds contamination and keeps the pattern alive inside it.

changes.before: the body is being taught to amplify a pattern it already half contains
changes.after: your method conditions the body to amplify a pattern it already half contains

changes.before: "Not as the insertion point."
changes.after: "As the place where it answers."

changes.before: what the tissue has already been taught to keep
changes.after: what the tissue keeps once you've taught it long enough

changes.before: That hit. Jandice's face closed, though not all the way. / For the first time all day uncertainty touched the edge of her poise. / Someone else had the next move.
changes.after: Jandice went still and set her mouth hard. / For the first time all day her poise slipped. / The decision was out of her hands now.

changes.before: The route down began behind a door disguised as paneling at the end of a service hall Jaina had not been shown earlier...
changes.after: The way down opened behind paneling at the end of a service hall Jaina had not seen earlier...

changes.before: Wood met stone, quiet and final.
changes.after: the panel door eased shut with a soft wood-on-stone click
